miroirTests.transformerTestDescription: Checks that a literal value matches a literal schema
Checks that a string value matches a string schema
Checks that boolean value true matches a boolean schema
Checks that boolean value false matches a boolean schema
Checks that a string value matches a schema reference resolving to a string schema
Checks type-checking a simple object with union and optional attributes against a schema reference
Checks type-checking a deeply nested object containing union-typed attributes
Checks type-checking a recursive object structure defined via schema reference
Checks type-checking a record schema containing schema references to a recursive object type
Checks that a number value matches a union(string, number) schema, resolving to the number branch
Checks that a string value against an any schema resolves to a string schema
Checks that a number value against an any schema resolves to a number schema
Checks that a flat object value against an any schema resolves to an object schema
Checks that a nested object value against an any schema resolves to a nested object schema
Checks that an array value against an any schema resolves to a tuple schema (default arrayAsTuple behavior)
Checks that null against an any schema resolves to a null schema
Checks that a boolean value against an any schema resolves to a boolean schema
Checks that an empty object against an any schema resolves to an empty object schema
